artPrompt: An evocative scene of a colossal rigged wheel of fortune filling the frame, its blank glyphless segments smeared into a spinning hot-gold blur that will never stop, a small silhouetted figure splayed and bound across its face mid-rotation in steep foreshortening. Smoky black carnival void surrounds it, ember sparks and scattered dice caught in the centrifugal whirl, inescapable motion, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: the wheel keeps spinning and you are on it now
manaCost: {∞}, then a coin you'll never get back
text:
you cannot stop spinning the wheel. roll a die. roll it again. there is no end to this step. repeat this step.
the wheel does not have numbers anymore. it has your name in every slot. it lands on you. it lands on you. it lands on you.
winner takes all. there is no winner. there is only all.
the snack is gone. it was always gone. you ate it in a dream and the dream charged you for it.
flavorText: the carny stopped barking hours ago but you can still hear it

extras.surreal: the wheel has your name in every slot
